title_ar: تطور التحول الرقمي في المملكة العربية السعودية

sections.intent: Trace the foundational phase of Saudi Arabia's digital transformation from Vision 2030 launch through pre-pandemic milestones. Cite specific policy initiatives and infrastructure projects.
claims: Vision 2030 launched in 2016 with explicit digital transformation pillars

sections.intent: Analyze how the COVID-19 pandemic accelerated digital adoption in Saudi government and private sectors. Reference healthcare digitization (Tawakkalna, Sehhaty) and education.
claims: Distance learning platforms scaled to 7 million students
